description: SpectroCough is an AI-powered respiratory illness pre-screening system that analyzes cough audio to detect early signs of respiratory diseases such as COVID-19, tuberculosis, pneumonia, bronchitis, and asthma. It provides rapid, contactless, and affordable health screening using acoustic signal processing and machine learning techniques.
purpose: The system is designed as a non-diagnostic triage tool that assists healthcare providers and individuals by offering supportive evidence for early respiratory illness detection.
key_capabilities: Fake cough and non-cough sound detection
Support for telemedicine and remote monitoring
disclaimer: SpectroCough is a pre-screening aid that provides supportive evidence and is not a medical diagnosis system.
